since_last: 47% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.99%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 47% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC -0.89% · Gold -0.13% · Nasdaq100 -0.28%. 47% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.99%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.99%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.39%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -6.19%
cards.body: Leaders: PWR +5.52%, BIDU +3.36%, AVAV +2.32%, GOOGL +1.89%, OKTA +1.88%. Laggards: SKHY -6.19%, ARM -4.34%, TSM -4.19%, MRVL -3.34%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.44% at $135.86
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.44% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
